title: Per-phase 结果行「结果+关键项」 + validate 富化 + scan payoff
description: Replace opaque install/skip counts with 'result + key items' lines. hooks -> show skill×N + hook×N category (skill must be visible since the header says skill). mcp -> list configured client names (map result.installed to friendly labels). raw path/count -> only via --debug. validate -> zh-CN checklist (config / hooks paths / events ready) instead of single-line English 'Validation passed'. env scan -> surface <=4 forensicReport findings at scan-complete as the 'it-gets-me' payoff. Renders through the unified renderer from TASK-001.
action: In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/hooks.stage.ts (formatStageResult ~line 119, installed/skipped arrays ~104-106): emit a result line exposing skill category count + hook count, e.g. t('cli.install.hooks.result', {skills, hooks}) -> '✓ skill×N + hook×N 已最新'; apply the 已最新 rule (installed=0 && skipped>0 && errors=0 -> '已最新 ✓ (N 项无需改动)'); move raw paths/counts behind context.args.debug. In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/mcp.stage.ts (~line 66 result.installed.length): map result.installed entries to friendly client labels (Claude Code / Codex CLI / Desktop) via a clientLabel map and list names, e.g. '✓ 已配 Claude Code / Codex CLI'; raw config paths behind --debug; if installed entries are config paths not friendly names, derive the label (R11). In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/validate.stage.ts (line 75): replace console.log(paint.success('Validation passed')) with a zh-CN checklist via t('cli.install.validate.passed.checklist') listing config / hooks paths / events ready (keys also added in TASK-005). In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/env.stage.ts (after scan-complete ~line 98): surface <=4 high-information findings from the already-built forensicReport (clients detected / project stack / existing fabric status: bound store count / existing knowledge count) via t() copy; data reused from scaffold.forensicReport, no new scan cost; hard cap 4 lines.

criteria: grep -niE 'skill' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/hooks.stage.ts shows the result-line emits a skill category count (skill is exposed in hooks output, not only the header)
grep -n 'Validation passed' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/validate.stage.ts returns 0 matches (replaced by a t() zh-CN checklist key)
grep -nE 'forensicReport|scaffold.forensicReport' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/env.stage.ts shows the report is read for display after scan-complete (not only written to forensic.json)
grep -nE 'Claude Code|Codex|clientLabel' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/mcp.stage.ts shows installed entries mapped to friendly client labels rather than raw count/path
[runtime] a test asserts the env stage surfaces at most 4 finding lines from a stub forensicReport (hard cap enforced)
[runtime] a test asserts hooks stage with installed=0 skipped=N errors=0 emits a '已最新' result line and that raw counts only appear when args.debug is true
convergence.verification: cd packages/cli && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test -- hooks.stage && pnpm test -- mcp.stage && pnpm test -- validate.stage && pnpm test -- env.stage
convergence.definition_of_done: hooks 露出 skill 类别;mcp 列已配客户端名;validate 输出 zh-CN 校验清单;env 扫描收尾 surface ≤4 条 forensic 发现作为它懂我时刻;裸 path/原始 count 移 --debug。

files.change: Result line with skill×N + hook×N; 已最新 rule; raw counts behind --debug
Map installed to friendly client labels; list names; raw paths behind --debug
Emit zh-CN checklist via t() (config/hooks/events ready)
Surface <=4 forensicReport findings via t(); reuse scaffold.forensicReport

implementation: Inspect forensic.ts to know which forensicReport fields carry clients / stack / existing-fabric status
In env.stage.ts after scan-complete, render <=4 findings from scaffold.forensicReport via t() copy (hard cap 4)
In hooks.stage.ts emit skill×N + hook×N result line; apply 已最新 rule; gate raw counts behind args.debug
In mcp.stage.ts add a clientLabel map; list friendly client names from result.installed (derive label if entries are paths); raw paths behind --debug
In validate.stage.ts replace the single-line English with a zh-CN checklist via t() (keys finalized in TASK-005)
Write tests: env <=4 cap, hooks 已最新 + --debug gating, mcp friendly labels, validate checklist; run tsc + the four stage suites

reference.pattern: Render result lines through the unified renderer established in TASK-001; reuse stageResult disposition model

rationale.chosen_approach: 'Result + key items' granularity (grill choice): one human result line + 1-3 key artifacts per phase; raw path/count to --debug. Scan payoff is the single highest-leverage anti-flatness change (reuses already-built report).
decision_factors: skill named in header but never surfaced
rationale.tradeoffs: Scan payoff capped at 4 lines to avoid re-creating an information wall (R3).

risks.risk: R11: mcp result.installed may be config paths not friendly names
risks.mitigation: inspect installMcpClients return shape; map to client label; fall back to count+category if name missing

risks.risk: R3: scan payoff shows too much -> information wall
risks.mitigation: hard cap <=4 lines, only highest-density fields

risks.risk: R4: changing formatStageResult copy may break i18n snapshot tests
risks.mitigation: update snapshots in same change; raw counts still available via --debug so no info lost
